Text.CultureInvariantString: Find an attunement frequency to infuse the runes with magical energy. Higher attunement levels grant additional bonus runes.

Name: Default__WBP_Runecrafting_MainPanel_C
Flags: RF_Public | RF_Transactional | RF_ClassDefaultObject | RF_ArchetypeObject | RF_WasLoaded | RF_LoadCompleted

AttunementPhaseDescriptionText.SourceString: Find an attunement frequency to infuse the runes with magical energy. Higher attunement levels grant additional bonus runes.
AttunementPhaseDescriptionText.LocalizedString: Find an attunement frequency to infuse the runes with magical energy. Higher attunement levels grant additional bonus runes.

InfusionPhaseDescriptionText.SourceString: As the attuned rune fills with power, mend it's cracks to contain the magic within and safeguard you bonus runes.
InfusionPhaseDescriptionText.LocalizedString: As the attuned rune fills with power, mend it's cracks to contain the magic within and safeguard you bonus runes.
